title: aloysia schulziana
intro: Aloysia schulziana, also known as Brazilian beebrush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a shrubby perennial with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Aloysia schulziana include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. Aloysia schulziana can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
